fairness_frame.note: Every selected no-Gov architecture receives 6 calls per packet, the same frozen packet set, the same output contract, and the same local gate. Provider-balanced architectures split those calls 2/2/2 across the three model DNA. OpenAI-5.4 homogeneous architectures bind all six calls to openai/gpt-5.4-mini.
